verses.latin_vulgate: Eructavit cor meum verbum bonum :  dico ego opera mea regi.  Lingua mea calamus scribæ  velociter scribentis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָ֘חַ֤שׁ לִבִּ֨י ׀ דָּ֘בָ֤ר ט֗וֹב אֹמֵ֣ר אָ֭נִי מַעֲשַׂ֣י לְמֶ֑לֶךְ לְ֝שׁוֹנִ֗י עֵ֤ט ׀ סוֹפֵ֬ר מָהִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: My heart hath uttered a good word: I speak my works to the king: My tongue is the pen of a scrivener that writeth swiftly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Morsiamen opetusvirsi kukkasesta Koran lapsilta edelläveisaajalle. (H45:2) Minun sydämeni ajattelee kauniin laulun: minä veisaan kuninkaasta, minun kieleni on jalon kirjoittajan kynä.
verses.king_james: My heart is inditing a good matter: I speak of the things which I have made touching the king: my tongue is the pen of a ready writer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Speciosus forma præ filiis hominum,  diffusa est gratia in labiis tuis :  propterea benedixit te Deus in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יׇפְיָפִ֡יתָ מִבְּנֵ֬י אָדָ֗ם ה֣וּצַק חֵ֭ן בְּשִׂפְתוֹתֶ֑יךָ עַל־כֵּ֤ן בֵּרַכְךָ֖ אֱלֹהִ֣ים לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou art beautiful above the sons of men: grace is poured abroad in thy lips; therefore hath God blessed thee for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet kaikkein kaunein ihmisten lasten seassa: armo on vuodatettu sinun huulissas; sentähden siunaa Jumala sinua ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Thou art fairer than the children of men: grace is poured into thy lips: therefore God hath blessed thee for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accingere gladio tuo super femur tuum, potentissime.
verses.douay_rheims: Gird thy sword upon thy thigh, O thou most mighty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pane miekkas vyölles, sinä sankari, ja kaunista itses kunniallisesti.
verses.king_james: Gird thy sword upon thy thigh, O most mighty, with thy glory and thy majesty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Specie tua et pulchritudine tua  intende, prospere procede, et regna,  propter veritatem, et mansuetudinem, et justitiam ;  et deducet te mirabiliter dextera tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲדָ֬רְךָ֨ ׀ צְלַ֬ח רְכַ֗ב עַֽל־דְּבַר־אֱ֭מֶת וְעַנְוָה־צֶ֑דֶק וְתוֹרְךָ֖ נוֹרָא֣וֹת יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: With thy comeliness and thy beauty set out, proceed prosperously, and reign. Because of truth and meekness and justice: and thy right hand shall conduct thee wonderfully.
verses.finnish_biblia: Menesty sinun kauneudessas, kiiruhda sinus sanan totuuden, siveyden ja vanhurskauden tähden, niin sinun oikia kätes ihmeellisiä osoittaa.
verses.king_james: And in thy majesty ride prosperously because of truth and meekness and righteousness; and thy right hand shall teach thee terrible things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sagittæ tuæ acutæ :  populi sub te cadent,  in corda inimicorum regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִצֶּ֗יךָ שְׁנ֫וּנִ֥ים עַ֭מִּים תַּחְתֶּ֣יךָ יִפְּל֑וּ בְּ֝לֵ֗ב אוֹיְבֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy arrows are sharp: under thee shall people fall, into the hearts of the king's enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Terävät ovat sinun nuoles, että kansat lankeevat etees maahan, jotka sydämestänsä kuninkaan viholliset ovat.
verses.king_james: Thine arrows are sharp in the heart of the king’s enemies; whereby the people fall under thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedes tua, Deus, in sæculum sæculi ;  virga directionis virga regni tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּסְאֲךָ֣ אֱ֭לֹהִים עוֹלָ֣ם וָעֶ֑ד שֵׁ֥בֶט מִ֝ישֹׁ֗ר שֵׁ֣בֶט מַלְכוּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy throne, O God, is forever and ever: the sceptre of thy kingdom is a sceptre of uprightness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala, sinun istuimes pysyy aina ja ijankaikkisesti; sinun valtakuntas valtikka on oikeuden valtikka.
verses.king_james: Thy throne, O God, is for ever and ever: the sceptre of thy kingdom is a right sceptre.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dilexisti justitiam, et odisti iniquitatem ;  propterea unxit te Deus, Deus tuus,  oleo lætitiæ, præ consortibus tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָהַ֣בְתָּ צֶּדֶק֮ וַתִּשְׂנָ֫א־רֶ֥שַׁע עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ מְשָׁחֲךָ֡ אֱלֹהִ֣ים אֱ֭לֹהֶיךָ שֶׁ֥מֶן שָׂשׂ֗וֹן מֵחֲבֵרֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast loved justice, and hated iniquity: therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä rakastit vanhurskautta, ja vihasit jumalatointa menoa: sentähden, oi Jumala, on sinun Jumalas voidellut sinua ilo-öljyllä enempi kuin sinun osaveljes.
verses.king_james: Thou lovest righteousness, and hatest wickedness: therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.

verses.latin_vulgate: Myrrha, et gutta, et casia a vestimentis tuis,  a domibus eburneis ; ex quibus delectaverunt te
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֹר־וַאֲהָל֣וֹת קְ֭צִיעוֹת כׇּל־בִּגְדֹתֶ֑יךָ מִֽן־הֵ֥יכְלֵי שֵׁ֝֗ן מִנִּ֥י שִׂמְּחֽוּךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Myrrh and stacte and cassia perfume thy garments, from the ivory houses: out of which
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki sinun vaattees ovat sula Mirrham, Aloe ja Ketsia. Kuin sinä elephantin luisesta tuvastas lähdet, niin he ilahuttavat sinun.
verses.king_james: All thy garments smell of myrrh, and aloes, and cassia, out of the ivory palaces, whereby they have made thee glad.

verses.latin_vulgate: filiæ regum in honore tuo.  Astitit regina a dextris tuis  in vestitu deaurato, circumdata varietate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנ֣וֹת מְ֭לָכִים בְּיִקְּרוֹתֶ֑יךָ נִצְּבָ֥ה שֵׁגַ֥ל לִ֝ימִינְךָ֗ בְּכֶ֣תֶם אוֹפִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The daughters of kings have delighted thee in thy glory. The queen stood on thy right hand, in gilded clothing; surrounded with variety.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun kaunistuksessas käyvät kuningasten tyttäret: morsian seisoo oikialla kädelläs sulassa kalliimmassa kullassa.
verses.king_james: Kings’ daughters were among thy honourable women: upon thy right hand did stand the queen in gold of Ophir.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audi, filia, et vide, et inclina aurem tuam ;  et obliviscere populum tuum, et domum patris tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעִי־בַ֣ת וּ֭רְאִי וְהַטִּ֣י אׇזְנֵ֑ךְ וְשִׁכְחִ֥י עַ֝מֵּ֗ךְ וּבֵ֥ית אָבִֽיךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hearken, O daughter, and see, and incline thy ear: and forget thy people and thy father's house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuule,tytär, katso, ja kallista korvas: unohda kansas ja isäs huone,
verses.king_james: Hearken, O daughter, and consider, and incline thine ear; forget also thine own people, and thy father’s house;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et concupiscet rex decorem tuum,  quoniam ipse est Dominus Deus tuus, et adorabunt eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִתְאָ֣ו הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ יׇפְיֵ֑ךְ כִּי־ה֥וּא אֲ֝דֹנַ֗יִךְ וְהִשְׁתַּֽחֲוִי־לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king shall greatly desire thy beauty; for he is the Lord thy God, and him they shall adore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuningas saa halun kauneutees; sillä hän on sinun herras, ja sinun pitää häntä kumartaman.
verses.king_james: So shall the king greatly desire thy beauty: for he is thy Lord; and worship thou him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et filiæ Tyri in muneribus vultum tuum deprecabuntur ;  omnes divites plebis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַֽת־צֹ֨ר ׀ בְּ֭מִנְחָה פָּנַ֥יִךְ יְחַלּ֗וּ עֲשִׁ֣ירֵי עָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the daughters of Tyre with gifts, yea, all the rich among the people, shall entreat thy countenance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tyron tytär lahjoinensa, rikkaat kansan seassa sinua imartelevat.
verses.king_james: And the daughter of Tyre shall be there with a gift; even the rich among the people shall intreat thy favour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis gloria ejus filiæ regis ab intus,  in fimbriis aureis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־כְּבוּדָּ֣ה בַת־מֶ֣לֶךְ פְּנִ֑ימָה מִֽמִּשְׁבְּצ֖וֹת זָהָ֣ב לְבוּשָֽׁהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the glory of the king's daughter is within in golden borders,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuninkaan tytär on kokonansa kunniallinen sisältä: hän on kultaisessa vaatteessa puetettu.
verses.king_james: The king’s daughter is all glorious within: her clothing is of wrought gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: circumamicta varietatibus.  Adducentur regi virgines post eam ;  proximæ ejus afferentur tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִרְקָמוֹת֮ תּוּבַ֢ל לַ֫מֶּ֥לֶךְ בְּתוּל֣וֹת אַ֭חֲרֶיהָ רֵעוֹתֶ֑יהָ מ֖וּבָא֣וֹת לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Clothed round about with varieties. After her shall virgins be brought to the king: her neighbours shall be brought to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän viedään monella tavalla kudotuissa vaatteissa kuninkaan tykö: neitseet, hänen ystävänsä, jotka häntä seuraavat, tuodaan sinun tykös.
verses.king_james: She shall be brought unto the king in raiment of needlework: the virgins her companions that follow her shall be brought unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Afferentur in lætitia et exsultatione ;  adducentur in templum regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּ֭וּבַלְנָה בִּשְׂמָחֹ֣ת וָגִ֑יל תְּ֝בֹאֶ֗ינָה בְּהֵ֣יכַל מֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall be brought with gladness and rejoicing: they shall be brought into the temple of the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne viedään ilolla ja riemulla, ja he menevät kuninkaan tupaan.
verses.king_james: With gladness and rejoicing shall they be brought: they shall enter into the king’s palace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro patribus tuis nati sunt tibi filii ;  constitues eos principes super omnem terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֣חַת אֲ֭בֹתֶיךָ יִהְי֣וּ בָנֶ֑יךָ תְּשִׁיתֵ֥מוֹ לְ֝שָׂרִ֗ים בְּכׇל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Instead of thy fathers, sons are born to thee: thou shalt make them princes over all the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun isäis siaan pitää sinun lapsia saaman, jotka asetat päämiehiksi kaikkeen maailmaan.
verses.king_james: Instead of thy fathers shall be thy children, whom thou mayest make princes in all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memores erunt nominis tui in omni generatione et generationem :  propterea populi confitebuntur tibi in æternum, et in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַזְכִּ֣ירָה שִׁ֭מְךָ בְּכׇל־דֹּ֣ר וָדֹ֑ר עַל־כֵּ֥ן עַמִּ֥ים יְ֝הוֹד֗וּךָ לְעֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: They shall remember thy name throughout all generations. Therefore shall people praise thee for ever; yea, for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tahdon muistaa sinun nimeäs sukukunnasta niin sukukuntaan: sentähden pitää kansat sinua kiittämän aina ja ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: I will make thy name to be remembered in all generations: therefore shall the people praise thee for ever and ever.
